globalRule.description: Identifies 'Transmission Plant' records with a past Commission_Date and a non-null Vehicle_Category where Capacity_Per_Month is outside the valid range of 500 to 30000.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Facility_Type@ = 'Transmission Plant' AND @Commission_Date@ < CURRENT_DATE() AND (@Capacity_Per_Month@ < 500 OR @Capacity_Per_Month@ > 30000) AND @Vehicle_Category@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Flags active 'Component Manufacturing Plant' records with a non-null Quality_Rating where Capacity_Per_Month is outside the valid range of 500 to 15000.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Facility_Type@ = 'Component Manufacturing Plant' AND @Operational_Status@ = 'Active' AND (@Capacity_Per_Month@ < 500 OR @Capacity_Per_Month@ > 15000) AND @Quality_Rating@ IS NOT NULL;

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Facility_Type is 'Component Manufacturing Plant' with a Capacity_Per_Month outside 1000-25000, and a Commission_Date in the future.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Facility_Type@ = 'Component Manufacturing Plant' AND (@Capacity_Per_Month@ < 1000 OR @Capacity_Per_Month@ > 25000) AND @Commission_Date@ > CURRENT_DATE();

globalRule.description: Records where the Facility_Type is 'Transmission Plant' and the Capacity_Per_Month is outside the valid range of 500 to 20000, while the plant is 'Active'.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM INTERNALQUERY WHERE @Facility_Type@ = 'Transmission Plant' AND (@Capacity_Per_Month@ < 500 OR @Capacity_Per_Month@ > 20000) AND @Operational_Status@ = 'Active';

globalRule.description: Records where the Facility Type is 'Vehicle Assembly Plant' and the operational status is not 'Closed' but the Capacity Per Month is outside the expected range of 500 to 15000.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.Auto plants` WHERE Facility_Type = 'Vehicle Assembly Plant' AND Operational_Status != 'Closed' AND (Capacity_Per_Month < 500 OR Capacity_Per_Month > 15000)
